title: deer-flow.cycle.snapshot v1
description: Point-in-time renderable view of a stack-tuner cycle. Fires on status transitions (started, in_progress after each stage, completed, failed, cancelled) so dashboards can show live progress without waiting for cycle.done. Complements deer-flow.stack-tuner.cycle.done.v1 (terminal) and deer-flow.metaprobe.cycle.v1 (rollup). Source: /deer-flow/stack-tuner.

cycle_id.description: Unique cycle identifier — matches cycle.start subject and all stage.* events

status.description: Current lifecycle status at the moment of this snapshot

question_class.description: Router classification of the question (trivial, general, strategic, surgical)

question.description: First 200 chars of the question being explored

verdict.description: Terminal verdict when status is completed or failed; null while in_progress

score.description: Current best score — may update as stages complete

lift.description: Score delta over pre-cycle baseline — null until at least one stage scores

wall_elapsed_s.description: Seconds elapsed since cycle start at snapshot time

cumulative_cost_usd.description: Accumulated model cost in USD at snapshot time

stage_count.description: Total stages planned for this cycle

stages_completed.description: Stages that have finished (ok or error) at snapshot time

error.description: Error summary when status is failed; null otherwise

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when this cycle began
